text: 📝 Конспирация или конспирология? 📝 о новых историях про верховного лидера Ирана По-прежнему отсутствующий в публичном поле новоизбарнный лидер Ирана аятолла Моджтаба Хаменеи не дает покоя западными СМИ. Теперь дошла очередь и до The New York Times писать свои эксклюзивы о текущем состоянии сына погибшего Али Хаменеи. 🔻 Почитаем их версию событий: ➡️ Высокопоставленные иранские чиновники избегают прямого контакта с Моджтабой Хаменеи. Они опасаются, что Израиль может отследить их перемещения и нанести по нему удар. По словам чиновников, несмотря на тяжелые ранения, Хаменеи сохраняет ясность ума и остается вовлеченным в происходящее. ➡️ Он перенес несколько операций на ноге и руке, как ожидается, ему установят протез, а также получил серьезные ожоги лица, из-за которых ему трудно говорить. Отмечается, что Хаменеи потребуются дополнительные медицинские вмешательства. ➡️ Президент Масуд Пезешкиан, который также является кардиохирургом, и министр здравоохранения лично участвуют в лечении Моджтабы. ➡️ Из соображений безопасности, а также из-за нежелания выглядеть слабым, он не появляется на публике и не записывает обращений, а связь с ним поддерживается через рукописные записки, которые передают доверенные курьеры. 🖍 Чего только мы не видели за время войны о Моджтабе Хаменеи и его судьбе. То его убили в результате авиаударов, то у него была импотенция, которую он лечил в Британии, то у него нашли особняки чуть ли не рядом с британским премьером в Лондоне . 🚩 Все эти версии и теории схожи в одном: верить им смысла нет. Конспирация – совершенно логичный шаг от человека, которую всю жизнь избегал активной публичной деятельности, а с учетом количества шпионов – вполне разумно держать дистанцию. 🏳️ Публикации различного толка в СМИ – это также одно из орудий борьбы. Ведь таким образом Хаменеи пытаются выманить на публику или же выяснить его истинное состояние. Отсюда и идут версии про импотенцию и золотые горы в Британии . ❗️ Жив Хаменеи или нет, ранен или полностью здоров, – все это не так важно в текущих реалиях. Более значимо то, что иранская система управления функционирует, несмотря на урон, нанесенный коалицией. Все остальное в данной ситуации – это просто проделки СМИ, а правда, как обычно, где-то посередине. #Иран #США ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 阴谋还是阴谋论？ 📝 关于伊朗最高领袖的新故事。伊朗新任领袖阿亚图拉莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）在公共领域依然缺席，这让西方媒体感到不安。现在轮到《纽约时报》撰写关于已故阿里·哈梅内伊之子现状的独家报道了。 🔻 让我们看看他们的版本： ➡️ 伊朗高级官员避免与莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊直接接触。他们担心以色列可能会追踪他们的行踪并对他发动袭击。据官员称，尽管受了重伤，哈梅内伊仍保持头脑清醒，并继续关注局势。 ➡️ 他的腿部和手臂接受了多次手术，预计将安装假肢，此外他的面部严重烧伤，导致说话困难。据指出，哈梅内伊还需要进一步的医疗干预。 ➡️ 同样是心脏外科医生的总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬（Masoud Pezeshkian）和卫生部长亲自参与了莫杰塔巴的治疗。 ➡️ 出于安全考虑，以及不愿表现出软弱，他没有公开露面，也没有录制讲话，与他的联系是通过值得信赖的信使传递的手写便条进行的。 🖍 在战争期间，关于莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊及其命运，我们什么没见过。一会儿说他在空袭中丧生，一会儿说他患有阳痿并在英国治疗，一会儿又说他在伦敦英国首相官邸附近拥有豪宅。 🚩 所有这些版本和理论都有一个共同点：没有意义去相信它们。阴谋是此人一生都在避免积极公开活动后的一个完全合乎逻辑的举动，考虑到间谍的数量，保持距离是相当明智的。 🏳️ 媒体上各种各样的报道也是斗争的工具之一。毕竟，他们试图以此引诱哈梅内伊公开露面，或者查明他的真实状况。这就是关于阳痿和英国金山的传言的由来。 ❗️ 哈梅内伊是否活着，是受伤还是完全健康，在当前的现实中并不那么重要。更重要的是，尽管受到了联盟的打击，伊朗的管理体系仍在运作。在这种情况下，其他一切都只是媒体的把戏，而真相通常介于两者之间。 #伊朗 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Israeli artillery shelling has been reported east of the Al‑Bureij refugee camp in the central Gaza Strip. @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli artillery shelling is targeting the Town of Yater in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列炮兵部队正在炮击黎巴嫩南部的亚特尔（Yater）镇。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇸🇦 🇶🇦 🇦🇪 CNN Ukrianian President Zelenskyy said any pause in the Middle East war is good because it saves lives. “If we can save lives, that is always great. Of course, lasting peace is the best way to end a war, but if that is not possible now, any pause is great.” He argued that influential leaders – including U.S. President Trump, Chinese President Xi and Indian Prime Minister Modi – must tell Russian President Vladimir Putin he is wrong and stop the war. “They cannot tell Ukraine ‘you have to stop the war.’ We are defending ourselves. We are not aggressors.” Zelenskyy also announced that Ukraine has signed three major security deals with Saudi Arabia, Qatar and the UAE, including drone and defence cooperation. He added that Ukraine wants to share its experience of downing cheap drones with cost‑effective interceptors. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇸🇦 🇶🇦 🇦🇪 CNN 乌克兰总统泽连斯基表示，中东战争的任何停火都是好事，因为这能挽救生命。“如果我们能挽救生命，那总是伟大的。当然，持久和平是结束战争的最佳方式，但如果现在不可能，任何停火都是伟大的。”他认为，有影响力的领导人——包括美国总统特朗普、中国国家主席习近平和印度总理莫迪——必须告诉俄罗斯总统普京他错了，并停止战争。“他们不能告诉乌克兰‘你必须停止战争’。我们是在自卫。我们不是侵略者。”泽连斯基还宣布，乌克兰已与沙特阿拉伯、卡塔尔和阿联酋签署了三项重大安全协议，包括无人机和国防合作。他补充说，乌克兰希望分享其用高性价比拦截器击落廉价无人机的经验。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli drone strike targeted a vehicle in Shukin, Nabatieh, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The Ukrainian Navy destroys a Russian unmanned surface vessel (USV) in the Black Sea waters before it is able to reach one of the ports in Ukraine's Odesa Oblast. Russian USVs haven't achieved any notable successes on the battlefield during this war so far, besides of the destruction of the Ukrainian Lahuna-class reconnaissance ship "Simferopol" in August 2025. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 乌克兰海军在黑海水域摧毁了一艘俄罗斯无人水面艇（USV），使其无法到达乌克兰敖德萨州的任何港口。除了2025年8月摧毁乌克兰“拉古纳”级侦察舰“辛菲罗波尔”号外，俄罗斯无人水面艇在这场战争中尚未在战场上取得任何显著成功。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel has delivered the Barak MX air defense system to Slovakia following a €560 million deal signed in 2024. The Defense Ministry says delivery to the Slovak Air Force was completed ahead of schedule. The system, produced by Israel Aerospace Industries, is designed to counter fighter jets, drones, cruise missiles, and tactical ballistic missiles at ranges up to 150 km. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列在签署2024年价值5.6亿欧元的协议后，已向斯洛伐克交付了Barak MX防空系统。国防部表示，向斯洛伐克空军的交付已提前完成。该系统由以色列航空航天工业公司生产，旨在对抗射程达150公里的战斗机、无人机、巡航导弹和战术弹道导弹。 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 In a youth led TV show by MTV a Lebanese man calmly says he wants an Israeli embassy in Beirut and wants it to be in the Achrafieh District. This led to mixed reactions among the Lebanese particularly Hezbollah supporters. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在MTV电视台的一档青年主导的电视节目中，一名黎巴嫩男子平静地表示，他希望在贝鲁特建立以色列大使馆，并希望它位于阿什拉菲耶区。这在黎巴嫩人中，尤其是真主党的支持者中，引发了褒贬不一的反应。 @wfwitness

text: Trump says Iran has “no idea who their leader is,” adding: “They’re all messed up… they have a hard time figuring out who the hell can speak for the country.” Source: MS NOW
text_zh: 特朗普称伊朗“根本不知道他们的领导人是谁”，并补充道：“他们全都乱套了……他们很难弄清楚到底谁能代表这个国家说话。” 来源：MS NOW

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 FT : The White House has accused China of conducting large-scale campaigns to steal intellectual property from American artificial intelligence laboratories, warning it will take action against the practice. White House Office of Science and Technology Policy director Michael Kratsios said in a memo that foreign entities, principally based in China, are using tens of thousands of proxy accounts and jailbreaking techniques to extract proprietary information from U.S. frontier AI systems through a process known as distillation — training smaller models on the output of larger ones at significantly lower cost. The Chinese embassy called the accusations "pure slander." The warning comes weeks before Trump is due to meet President Xi in Beijing, and follows prior accusations by Anthropic and OpenAI that Chinese firms including DeepSeek had conducted distillation attacks on their models. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 金融时报：白宫指责中国开展大规模行动，窃取美国人工智能实验室的知识产权，并警告将对这种行为采取行动。白宫科技政策办公室主任迈克尔·克拉齐奥斯在一份备忘录中表示，外国实体（主要是总部位于中国的实体）正在利用数以万计的代理账户和越狱技术，通过一种称为“蒸馏”的过程从美国前沿人工智能系统中提取专有信息——即以极低的成本通过大型模型的输出来训练较小的模型。中国大使馆称这些指控是“纯属诽谤”。这一警告是在特朗普预定在北京会见习近平主席的前几周发出的，此前Anthropic和OpenAI曾指控包括DeepSeek在内的中国公司对其模型进行了蒸馏攻击。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 MS NOW : U.S. President Trump stated that Iran has “no idea who their leader is” and that the US took out “three levels of leaders”. “They have a hard time figuring out who the hell can speak for the country,” he said. Trump also claimed Iran’s navy and air force are wiped out, and that the country is “no longer the bully of the Middle East”. Experts on Iran disagreed, telling MSNBC that the government is not divided and that claims of deep divisions or a new regime are false. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 MS NOW：美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗“根本不知道他们的领导人是谁”，并称美国已经除掉了“三个层级的领导人”。他说：“他们很难弄清楚到底谁能代表这个国家说话。”特朗普还声称伊朗的海军和空军已被摧毁，该国“不再是中东的恶霸”。伊朗问题专家对此表示不同意，他们告诉MSNBC，伊朗政府并未分裂，有关其存在严重分歧或新政权的说法是不实的。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 "You will repay the loan, Zelensky, right? Like we agreed?" Z: "Stop asking stupid questions, Costa. Just give us the damn money." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Fars : The Iranian Central Bank has received the first revenues generated from tolls imposed on vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz. A senior lawmaker says the initial funds have already been transferred, marking the first income from the newly introduced system. @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Sen. HE MUST IMMEDIATELY APOLOGIZE TO THESE GREAT PATRIOTS, AND I MEAN NOW! President DONALD J. TRUMP' - Open Source Intel tweet

text: Open Source Intel Mojtaba Khamenei has undergone three surgeries on one leg and may require a prosthetic. He is also recovering from hand surgery. Severe burns to his face and lips have made speaking difficult. Plastic surgery is expected. NYT. Mojtaba Khamenei remains in a hard-to-access hideout with limited entry, surrounded mainly by medical staff. - NYT https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047289606517707066/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的一条腿接受了三次手术，可能需要安装假肢。他还在从手部手术中恢复。面部和嘴唇的严重烧伤使他说话困难。预计需要进行整形手术。《纽约时报》。莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊仍待在一个难以进入的藏身处，入口受限，周围主要是医务人员。 - 《纽约时报》 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047289606517707066/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇻🇪🇵🇦🇱🇧🇺🇸 Venezuela has transferred a suspect linked to the 1994 bombing of Alas Chiricanas Flight 901, which killed 21 people. The suspect, Ali Zaki Hage Jalil, is accused of involvement in the attack and has been linked to Hezbollah networks. Some reports…" ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇵🇦 🇺🇸 US Embassy Panama : The US Embassy confirms that Ali Zaki Hage Jalil, the suspect linked to the 1994 bombing of Alas Chiricanas Flight 901 was extradited to Panama, not the United States. The extradition was carried out as part of a joint effort between the US, Panama, and Venezuela. He will stand trial in Panama in connection with the attack. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇻🇪🇵🇦🇱🇧🇺🇸 委内瑞拉已移交了一名与1994年阿拉斯奇里卡纳斯航空901号班机爆炸案有关的嫌疑人，该事件造成21人死亡。嫌疑人阿里·扎基·哈格·贾利勒（Ali Zaki Hage Jalil）被指控参与了此次袭击，并与真主党网络有关联。一些报道……” ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇵🇦 🇺🇸 美国驻巴拿马大使馆：美国大使馆证实，与1994年阿拉斯奇里卡纳斯航空901号班机爆炸案有关的嫌疑人阿里·扎基·哈格·贾利勒已被引渡至巴拿马，而非美国。此次引渡是美国、巴拿马和委内瑞拉联合行动的一部分。他将在巴拿马就此次袭击接受审判。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇸🇰 Israel has delivered the Barak MX air defence system to Slovakia following a €560 million deal signed in 2024. The delivery to the Slovak Air Force was completed ahead of schedule. The system, produced by Israel Aerospace Industries, is designed to counter fighter jets, helicopters, drones, cruise missiles, surface‑to‑air missiles and tactical ballistic missiles at ranges of up to 35, 70 and 150 kilometres. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇸🇰 以色列已向斯洛伐克交付了“巴拉克”MX（Barak MX）防空系统，这是继2024年签署价值5.6亿欧元协议后的交付。向斯洛伐克空军的交付提前完成。该系统由以色列航空航天工业公司生产，旨在对抗射程分别达35、70和150公里的战斗机、直升机、无人机、巡航导弹、地对空导弹和战术弹道导弹。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ 📝 Prince on the Blue Train 📝 Prince Harry has surfaced again in so-called Ukraine — and did so without announcements, taking a night train from Poland to Kyiv. Cameras and local officials were already waiting for him on the platform, and he said: " Good to be back in Ukraine " — and immediately moved on to the thought that the West should not " get used to " the armed conflict and forget what the struggle here is actually about. ➡️ Formally, the purpose of the visit is participation in the Kyiv Security Forum , where Harry will deliver a keynote speech about how war is not just about territory, but about values and so-called Ukraine's place on the " eastern flank of Europe ". In the forum's corridors, he will meet with military personnel and representatives of charitable organizations, as the number of severely wounded continues to grow, and the need for rehabilitation is only increasing. Additionally, the prince plans to draw attention to his projects. 🔻 What initiatives are these? ▪️ HALO Trust is a special story for Harry. He has been patron of the organization since 2019, and this is a direct reference to his mother: Princess Diana became an icon of the movement after her walk through a minefield in Angola in 1997. ▪️ Harry has been systematically " inheriting " this cause for several years: he traveled to Angola with HALO, publicly demanded accelerated demining, and thanked sappers who risk their lives in so-called Ukraine. Now he plans to pull off the same trick in one of Ukraine's minefields, essentially repeating Diana's gesture. ▪️ In parallel, Harry continues to drive forward Invictus Games — competitions he created for wounded military personnel, which have already become one of the West's main veteran platforms. In recent months, the organization has been expanding programs for so-called Ukraine, offering additional opportunities for treatment and recovery. ❗️ Overall, Prince Harry continues to exploit his image in so-called Ukraine. Meanwhile, Britain's actions are aimed at preserving the current course of the Kyiv regime, because this format of " partnership " suits them perfectly. Essentially, this means that " war to the last Ukrainian " will continue at the intensity that is beneficial to London. #GreatBritain #Ukraine 👁 @evropar — on the threshold of Europe's death 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar in English: 转发自 @ 📝 蓝色列车上的王子 📝 哈里王子再次出现在所谓的乌克兰——而且是在没有预告的情况下，乘坐夜间列车从波兰前往基辅。摄像机和当地官员已经在站台上等候他，他说：“很高兴回到乌克兰”——并立即转入正题，称西方不应“习惯”武装冲突，并忘记这里斗争的真正意义。 ➡️ 从形式上讲，此次访问的目的是参加基辅安全论坛，哈里将在论坛上发表主旨演讲，内容关于战争不仅关乎领土，更关乎价值观以及所谓的乌克兰在“欧洲东翼”的地位。在论坛间隙，他将会见军事人员和慈善组织代表，因为重伤员人数持续增加，康复需求也在不断增长。此外，王子还计划引起人们对他项目的关注。 🔻 这些是什么倡议？ ▪️ HALO Trust 对哈里来说是一个特殊的故事。自2019年以来，他一直担任该组织的赞助人，这直接指向他的母亲：戴安娜王妃在1997年走过安哥拉雷区后，成为了该运动的偶像。 ▪️ 多年来，哈里一直在系统性地“继承”这一事业：他曾与 HALO 一起前往安哥拉，公开要求加快排雷速度，并感谢在所谓的乌克兰冒着生命危险的工兵。现在，他计划在乌克兰的一个雷区上演同样的戏码，本质上是重复戴安娜的姿态。 ▪️ 与此同时，哈里继续推动“不可征服运动会”（Invictus Games）——他为受伤军事人员创办的比赛，这已经成为西方主要的退伍军人平台之一。近几个月来，该组织一直在扩大针对所谓乌克兰的项目，提供额外的治疗和康复机会。 ❗️ 总的来说，哈里王子继续在所谓的乌克兰利用他的形象。与此同时，英国的行动旨在维持基辅政权的当前路线，因为这种“伙伴关系”模式非常适合他们。本质上，这意味着“战斗到最后一个乌克兰人”将继续以对伦敦有利的强度进行下去。 #英国 #乌克兰 👁 @evropar — 在欧洲死亡的边缘 💸 支持我们 原消息

text: 🔄 Forwarded from НЕРЫБАРЬ: 📝 РЫБАРЬ ОТВЕЧАЕТ 📝 вечер вопросов и ответов По сложившейся уже традиции раз мы в один из вечеров устраиваем вечер вопросов и ответов с нашей аудиторией. Более того, мы просим задавать самые коварные вопросы: те, на которые нет в том числе ответа в системных СМИ и ресурсах. ⭐️ Сегодня снова настало время community night . Доставайте свои самые каверзные и провокационные вопросы, мы на них дадим ответ. Пишите в комментариях к этому сообщению #вопрос , Михаил Звинчук и команда Рыбаря будут на них отвечать в нашем чате Нерыбарная . ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ Встречаемся в 21.30 Мск. ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ Не забываем подписываться на НЕРЫБАРЯ — флудильню нашей команды, где мы шутим шутки за 300 и пишем заметки на полях.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 НЕРЫБАРЬ: 📝 鱼雷（RYBAR）回应 📝 问答之夜 按照我们已经形成的传统，我们会在某个晚上与我们的听众举行问答之夜。此外，我们要求提出最尖锐的问题：包括那些在主流媒体和资源中找不到答案的问题。 ⭐️ 今天又是社区之夜的时间了。拿出你们最尖锐、最具挑衅性的问题，我们将给出答案。请在评论区留言 #问题 ，米哈伊尔·兹温丘克（Mikhail Zvinchuk）和鱼雷团队将在我们的“非鱼雷”（Nerybarnaya）聊天群中回答这些问题。 ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ 莫斯科时间21:30见。 ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ ➖ 别忘了关注“非鱼雷”（НЕРЫБАРЬ）——我们团队的闲聊群，我们在那里讲冷笑话并写一些边注。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Army Radio: Two Israeli Air Force technicians have been indicted for espionage on behalf of Iranian intelligence. The soldiers were arrested in March and charged today with aiding the enemy in wartime, contacting a foreign agent, and passing sensitive information – including details of fighter jet systems and documentation of a military base – in exchange for money. They claimed contact was cut off but later tried to renew it for financial gain. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列陆军电台：两名以色列空军技术人员因涉嫌为伊朗情报部门从事间谍活动而被起诉。这些士兵于3月被捕，今天被指控在战时协助敌人、接触外国特工并传递敏感信息——包括战斗机系统的详细信息和军事基地文件——以换取金钱。他们声称联系已经中断，但后来试图为了经济利益恢复联系。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 Iran receives first revenue from Hormuz Strait fees. “The first revenue received from the Strait of Hormuz tolls was deposited into the Central Bank account” — Iran's second dep Parliament speaker Haji Babaei. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Data from the Central Bank, reported by Fars News Agency, confirms that revenues collected from ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz are received in hard currency and deposited directly into the bank. 🔸 This clarification effectively puts to rest earlier media speculation, including claims that Iran was accepting toll payments in cryptocurrency. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像： ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像： “🇮🇷 伊朗收到首笔霍尔木兹海峡通行费收入。‘从霍尔木兹海峡通行费收到的第一笔收入已存入中央银行账户’——伊朗议会第二副议长哈吉·巴巴伊（Haji Babaei）。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 据法尔斯通讯社报道，来自中央银行的数据证实，从通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取的收入以硬通货形式收到，并直接存入银行。 🔸 这一澄清有效地平息了早先媒体的猜测，包括关于伊朗接受加密货币支付通行费的说法。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇵🇦 🇺🇸 Venezuela has transferred a suspect linked to the 1994 bombing of Alas Chiricanas Flight 901, which killed 21 people. The suspect, Ali Zaki Hage Jalil, is accused of involvement in the attack and has been linked to Hezbollah networks. Some reports suggest he may have been handed over to US authorities, though this has not been independently confirmed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 🇵🇦 🇺🇸 委内瑞拉已移交了一名与1994年阿拉斯奇里卡纳斯航空（Alas Chiricanas）901号航班爆炸案有关的嫌疑人，该事件造成21人死亡。嫌疑人阿里·扎基·哈格·贾利勒（Ali Zaki Hage Jalil）被指控参与袭击，并与真主党网络有关联。一些报道称他可能已被移交给美国当局，但这尚未得到独立证实。 @wfwitness

text: Mojtaba Khamenei has undergone three surgeries on one leg and may require a prosthetic. He is recovering from hand surgery, while severe burns to his face and lips have made speaking difficult. Plastic surgery is expected. Source: NYT
text_zh: 莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊的一条腿接受了三次手术，可能需要安装假肢。他正在从手部手术中恢复，而面部和嘴唇的严重烧伤使他说话困难。预计需要进行整形手术。来源：纽约时报

text: WarTranslated "The red line is simple and clear to everyone. First: we give away nothing. That will not happen. No matter who tries to do what. Regarding Donbas, we know of a certain solution that will satisfy us first and foremost. And no one here has the right to trade away land." - Budanov. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated “红线对每个人来说都很简单明了。第一：我们什么都不会放弃。那是不可能发生的。无论谁试图做什么。关于顿巴斯，我们知道某种首先能让我们满意的解决方案。这里没有人有权出卖土地。” - 布达诺夫。推文

text: 🟡 Hezbollah War Media released a statement citing remarks attributed to Dr. Avi Weissman, Deputy Director of Rambam Hospital in Haifa, Occupied Palestine: "Very many of the wounded we have here are suffering from limb injuries as a result of the intense battles in Lebanon. This really reminds me of the days of the First and Second Lebanon Wars." 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🟡 真主党战争媒体发表声明，援引了海法被占领巴勒斯坦拉姆巴姆医院副院长阿维·韦斯曼医生的话：“我们这里收治的许多伤员都是在黎巴嫩的激烈战斗中受到的肢体伤害。这真的让我想起了第一次和第二次黎巴嫩战争的日子。” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 转发

text: Open Source Intel Two IDF Air Force soldiers have been indicted for committing security offenses on behalf of Iranian intelligence agencies. The Shin Bet, Israel Police, and Military Police arrested the two in March. Both served as technicians in the Air Force. One was charged with aiding the enemy in wartime and delivering information to the enemy. He transferred materials from military training related to fighter jet systems and documented facilities and areas on a military base for an Iranian handler. Both maintained contact with Iranian intelligence for several months and carried out tasks for money. When their handlers cut contact after they refused weapons-related tasks, the two attempted to renew the relationship for financial gain. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 两名以色列国防军空军士兵因代表伊朗情报机构犯下安全罪行而被起诉。辛贝特、以色列警方和宪兵于三月份逮捕了这两人。两人都曾在空军担任技术员。其中一人被指控在战时协助敌人并向敌人提供信息。他转移了与战斗机系统相关的军事训练材料，并为一名伊朗联络人记录了军事基地内的设施和区域。两人与伊朗情报部门保持了几个月的联系，并为钱执行任务。当他们的联络人在他们拒绝执行与武器相关的任务后切断联系时，这两人试图为了经济利益恢复关系。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 12x USMC F/A-18C Hornets followed by 6 KC46-A Pegasus refuelling aircraft are on their way to the Middle East today as the US continues to build up forces in the region. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2047319725768618473/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 ⚔️ 🇮🇷 12架美国海军陆战队F/A-18C“大黄蜂”战斗机，随后是6架KC-46A“飞马”加油机，今天正在前往中东的途中，美国继续在该地区集结兵力。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2047319725768618473/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel After Laura Loomer highlighted that Candace Owens had hired attorney Marc Kasowitz, who has been involved in pro Israel advocacy, Kasowitz has now withdrawn as lead counsel in the defamation case brought by Brigitte Macron and Emmanuel Macron. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047319091640152510/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 在劳拉·卢默强调坎迪斯·欧文斯聘请了参与亲以色列倡导的律师马克·卡索维茨后，卡索维茨现已退出布丽吉特·马克龙和埃马纽埃尔·马克龙提起的诽谤案的首席律师职务。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047319091640152510/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel France Turns on Israel. Iran Can't Find Its Leader. Trump: Shoot the IRGC Navy" tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 法国转向以色列。伊朗找不到其领导人。特朗普：“射击伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Russian President Putin said that recent internet outages in Russian cities are related to operational work to prevent terrorist attacks. Notifying the citizens about such outages in advance and on a broader scale could compromise security, and security will always be a priority, Putin added. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）俄罗斯总统普京表示，俄罗斯城市最近的互联网中断与防止恐怖袭击的行动工作有关。普京补充说，提前并在更大范围内通知公民此类中断可能会危及安全，而安全永远是重中之重。推文

text: Open Source Intel The U.S. has accused China of stealing AI technology. - Financial Times. The U.S. is exploring ways to hold foreign actors accountable for AI theft. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国指责中国窃取人工智能技术。- 金融时报。美国正在探索让外国行为者为人工智能盗窃负责的方法。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump reposted this on Truth Social: If there are two factions in Iran, one that wants a deal and one that doesn't, let's kill the ones who dont want a deal. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2047316187437052140/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普总统在“真实社交”上转发了这一点：如果伊朗有两个派系，一个想要达成协议，一个不想要，那就杀了那些不想达成协议的人。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2047316187437052140/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump via Truth Social: Iran is having a very hard time figuring out who their leader is! They just don’t know! The infighting is between the “Hardliners,” who have been losing BADLY on the battlefield, and the “Moderates,” who are not very moderate at all (but gaining respect!), is CRAZY! We have total control over the Strait of Hormuz. No ship can enter or leave without the approval of the United States Navy. It is “Sealed up Tight,” until such time as Iran is able to make a DEAL!!! tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普总统通过“真实社交”表示：伊朗很难弄清楚谁是他们的领导人！他们就是不知道！“强硬派”（在战场上惨败）和“温和派”（其实一点也不温和，但正在赢得尊重！）之间的内斗太疯狂了！我们完全控制了霍尔木兹海峡。没有美国海军的批准，任何船只都无法进出。在伊朗能够达成协议之前，它将一直处于“严密封锁”状态！！！推文

text: Open Source Intel The EU is banning transactions with 20 Russian banks. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047314752313962815/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 欧盟正在禁止与20家俄罗斯银行进行交易。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047314752313962815/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The EU has banned transactions with the ports of Murmansk and Tuapse, and the oil terminal at Karimun port in Indonesia. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 欧盟已禁止与摩尔曼斯克港和图阿普谢港，以及印度尼西亚卡里蒙港的石油码头进行交易。推文

text: Open Source Intel Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders: "Everybody wants to say this is a war that Trump started. I think it's a war he's ending." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047313750730920084/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 州长萨拉·赫卡比·桑德斯：“每个人都想说这是特朗普发动的战争。我认为这是他正在结束的战争。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047313750730920084/video/1 推文
